column1: Hi, I was charged twice for my subscription and I need a refund as soon as possible.
The mobile app keeps crashing when I try to log in after the latest update.
Thanks for the quick response yesterday. My issue is fixed now and everything works great.
Where can I download the invoice for March? I need it for expense reporting.
I canceled last week but my account is still active and I was billed again.
The delivery date shown in the app changed three times and my package still has not arrived.
Your support team was very helpful, but I still cannot reset my password on the website.
Please escalate this. Our entire team cannot access the dashboard and we have a deadline today.
I want to know whether the premium plan includes API access and usage analytics.
I love the new interface, but the export button does not work for large files.
Can someone help me update the credit card on my account before the renewal date?
This is urgent. Our payment failed even though the card is valid, and the service is blocked.
